description:
An intuitive video editor for every skill level.

Filmora is an intuitive video editor for every skill level. Filmora makes it easy for anyone to be creative. Jump into an editing experience where advanced features are simple and fun. We got rid of repetitive tasks so you can devote your energy to your imagination. Get inspired by Filmora, an editor designed for creators like you.
1. AI Idea to Video-New Feature : Turn Concepts into Short Video Instantly!​ ​Intelligent concept parsing​ and end-to-end AI Production​.
2. AI Smart Removal: In video editing, image materials support the AI smart removal feature. Simply paint over the target area to easily achieve seamless elimination, making the image cleaner and more polished.
3. Assets Center: Discover new theme-based assets and trending resources all in one centralized space.
4. Support for RAW Image Imports: Now compatible with RAW formats, preserving more image details and enhancing professional editing flexibility.
5. In-App Algorithm Enhancement: Improved processing efficiency and quality for a more refined and precise editing experience.
6. Fix bugs and address issues encountered during the user experience.
